problem: What membrane material filters all contaminants from water at low energy cost?
hypothesis: Combining Bacteriophage surface display for targeting with current standard of care could unlock function improves by addressing existing therapies only treat symptoms.

experiment.protocol: In vitro biocompatibility assay with 7 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: We cannot solve problems with the same thinking that created them. — Einstein paraphrase
